cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hi Abraham, this is Rohan from Shopo, sir. I'm calling about the cycle lock you've listed for sale.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: I'm interested in buying it. Can you tell me about its condition, ji? Is it used or brand new?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: It's used, but in good condition. Why do you want to know?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Just want to make sure it's worth the price, haan. Can I schedule a time to come see it in person?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: That's fine. When were you thinking?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: How about tomorrow afternoon? I can come by your place around 2 pm, sir.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Thik hai, that works. But let's discuss the price and all that when you come, okay?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Sounds good, Abraham. I'll see you tomorrow then. Thanks, sir.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Great, have a good day, ji.
